A1400H - Payer: Private insurance/Medigap CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is private insurance/Medigap. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
634 A1400I_PRVT_MC_PYR_SW A1400I_PRVT_MC_PYR_SW A1400I - Payer: Private managed care CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is private managed care. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
635 A1400J_SELF_PAY_PYR_SW A1400J_SELF_PAY_PYR_SW A1400J - Payer: Self-pay CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is self-pay. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
636
